accent.description: Electric Blue for primary actions and highlights

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'BarChart3', 'PieChart', 'TrendingUp', 'Globe', 'ShieldCheck', 'Users', 'Download', 'ChevronRight', 'Search', 'Filter', 'ShoppingCart' as primary set.

hero_section.structure: Full-screen (h-screen) with canvas particle background. Centered typography with maximum z-index.
hero_section.content: H1: 'Strategic Intelligence for the Future'. Sub: 'Premium market reports trusted by the Fortune 500'. Buttons: 'Explore Reports' (Accent), 'Custom Research' (Ghost).

report_catalog.card_style: Dark glassmorphism. Hover: Glow effect + slight lift.
report_catalog.filters: Sidebar or Top Bar sticky. Glass finish.

why_choose_us.layout: Asymmetrical 2-column. Left: Sticky typography. Right: Scrolling feature cards with 3D icons or high-quality abstract visuals.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00B4D8] text-white hover:bg-[#0096B4] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,180,216,0.3)] transition-all
buttons.cta_gold: bg-[#F59E0B] text-black hover:bg-[#D97706] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,158,11,0.3)]
buttons.ghost: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full px-8 py-4 backdrop-blur-md

report_card.wrapper: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 p-6 backdrop-blur-md transition-all hover:border-[#00B4D8]/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_40px_-10px_rgba(0,180,216,0.2)]
report_card.image: aspect-[4/3] rounded-lg bg-slate-800 object-cover mb-4 grayscale group-hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-500
report_card.title: text-xl font-bold text-white mb-2 group-hover:text-[#00B4D8] transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:border-[#00B4D8] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00B4D8] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 backdrop-blur-sm

motion.page_load: Fade in + Staggered slide up for elements.
motion.scroll: Use 'framer-motion' for whileInView animations. Opacity 0 -> 1, y: 20 -> 0.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'tailwind.config.js' includes the custom colors and fonts (Outfit/Inter).
Use 'react-tsparticles' or a custom Canvas for the Hero background effect. Keep it lightweight.
Implement the 'Shopping Cart' as a slide-over drawer (Sheet component from shadcn).
Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications (Added to Cart, Payment Success).
Strictly follow the Dark Mode aesthetic. No white backgrounds.
For the 'Report Detail Modal', use a Dialog component with a blurred backdrop.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': Do not use generic gradients or centered text everywhere.
Contrast is King: Ensure text is readable on dark backgrounds (WCAG AA).
Interactive Feedback: Every button and card MUST have a hover state.
Spacing: Use 'py-24' or 'py-32' for section spacing. Do not cram content.
No generic 50/50 layouts without a twist (offset, overlap, or asymmetry).
